responsibilities: Design and train deep learning models for object detection, classification, and segmentation using camera, LiDAR, and radar data
Develop sensor fusion algorithms that combine camera, LiDAR, and radar inputs to produce robust environmental perception outputs
Build and optimize point cloud processing pipelines for obstacle detection, ground segmentation, and 3D scene understanding
Implement multi-object tracking algorithms to maintain consistent identities of dynamic obstacles across consecutive sensor frames
Calibrate and synchronize multi-sensor rigs including cameras, LiDAR, and IMUs to ensure accurate spatial and temporal alignment
Optimize and deploy perception models on embedded GPU hardware using TensorRT to meet real-time inference latency budgets
Collaborate with planning and controls teams to define perception output formats that feed downstream autonomy modules
Evaluate perception system performance using precision, recall, and mAP metrics across diverse real-world test scenarios
Curate, label, and augment large-scale image and point cloud datasets to improve model robustness and generalization
